description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a minimalist design, featuring two main floors and a rooftop area. The structure is dominated by a central, rectangular concrete core that extends vertically through all levels, providing both support and privacy. Each floor has a cantilevered platform with light wood or beige flooring and white railings, creating open balconies or terraces on both levels. A spiral staircase with dark treads and white railings connects the floors, visible from the open sides. The house sits on a light, patterned base that resembles a tiled or wooden urban lot, and the absence of visible windows or doors suggests a conceptual or stylized architectural model. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and functional, with a focus on open circulation and outdoor space.
description: A modern, two-story house with a central concrete core, open balconies, and a spiral staircase connecting the levels. The design is minimalist with light wood floors and white railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open balconies, spiral staircase, and white railings on both levels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid central concrete core and the cantilevered platforms.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the concrete core, with minimal balcony visibility.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the spiral staircase and the open structure of the balconies.
attribute_entryway_design: No visible entryway; open balcony access with white railings and spiral staircase.
